## Problem
What user problem should DIOX solve?

## Proposed Feature
Describe behavior, expected output style, and MCP tools needed.

## Scope Check
Confirm feature stays inside DIOX personal-assistant boundaries:
- [ ] No unrestricted shell access
- [ ] No VPS/server control
- [ ] No payment/purchase automation
- [ ] No secret storage in repo

## Success Criteria
How will we validate this feature?
